name: CO₂ Mobile Fire Extinguisher — 9 kg
shortDescription: Wheeled carbon dioxide extinguisher for large electrical and switchgear risk areas.
longDescription: A trolley-mounted CO₂ unit for transformer yards, large switchgear rooms and generator halls where a portable 2–4.5 kg cylinder can't deliver enough clean, non-conductive agent. The wire-braided hose and flat horn with diffuser nozzle disperse CO₂ over a wider area than a standard bend-pipe horn, and the CCOE/PESO-approved cylinder is enamel painted externally with a high-grade PO Red finish. Rechargeable and non-conductive, leaving no residue on sensitive equipment.

images.alt: CO₂ Mobile Fire Extinguisher — 9 kg supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
